title: dichorisandra albomarginata var. marginata
intro: Dichorisandra albomarginata var. marginata, also known as the "White-Edged Dichorisandra", is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae, native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Dichorisandra albomarginata var. marginata include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the skin.
